response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience with developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and workshop initiatives, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership through open-source projects and workshops
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/TV), build systems, and infrastructure automation
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership experience
Limited evidence of strategic roadmap planning or organizational change initiatives
Mobile platform experience is ad-hoc (iOS app takeover) rather than systemic or scalable
